description: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc., a late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development of novel therapeutics for various cancer indications in the United States. The company's lead product candidate is galinpepimut-S (GPS), a peptide immunotherapy directed against the Wilms tumor 1, antigen; and SLS009 (tambiciclib), a selective small molecule cyclin-dependent kinase 9, or CDK9, inhibitor. It has a strategic collaboration with Merck & Co., Inc. to evaluate GPS as it is administered in combination with PD1 blocker pembrolizumab in a Phase 1/2 clinical trial enrolling pati
